mapper.select: SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TITLE, WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, RECEIVER_ID, RECEIVER_NAME, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TYPE_CODE, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TYPE_NAME, SOURCE_BIZ_ID, SOURCE_BIZ_NO, STATUS, CONFIRM_BY, CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CONFIRM_TIME, CHECK_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT ( ID,
CONFIRM_BY, CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CONFIRM_TIME,
WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TITLE, WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, RECEIVER_ID, RECEIVER_NAME, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TYPE_CODE, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TYPE_NAME, SOURCE_BIZ_ID, SOURCE_BIZ_NO, STATUS, CHECK_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{warehouseOutNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseOutTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{receiverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseOutTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseOutTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceBizId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sourceBizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{checkId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT
WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO = #{warehouseOutNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_OUT_TITLE = #{warehouseOutTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
WAREHOUSE_NAME = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
RECEIVER_NAME = #{receiverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_OUT_TYPE_CODE = #{warehouseOutTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_OUT_TYPE_NAME = #{warehouseOutTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SOURCE_BIZ_ID = #{sourceBizId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
SOURCE_BIZ_NO = #{sourceBizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CONFIRM_BY = #{confirmBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CONFIRM_BY_NAME = #{confirmByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONFIRM_TIME = #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CHECK_ID = #{checkId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id}
